title: Sugar Free Chocolate Chip Cookies Makes About 45
ingredients: ¾ cup Swerve granulated sugar replacement
¾ cup Swerve brown sugar replacement
8-10 oz sugar free chocolate chips( Lily’s or Hershey’s)
instructions:
Prepare a cookie sheet for nonstick, your favorite way.
In a medium bowl mix the flour, baking soda and salt and set aside.
In a large bowl, add the softened butter and sugars and mix until creamy and well blended. Add the eggs and vanilla and mix well.
Add the dry ingredients and chocolate chips. You can add more or less depending on your taste.
Spoon the cookie batter onto the prepared baking sheet and cook for about 9 minutes or until they begin to brown.
Cool on a paper towel and enjoy!
(About 5 net carbs per cookie.)
